display_text: Is your AI system a general-purpose AI (GPAI) model that has been designated, or is likely to be designated, as posing systemic risk due to high training compute or a Commission decision?
hint_text: Article 51 defines systemic-risk GPAI models as those trained with more than 10^25 FLOPs, or models so designated by Commission decision due to their capabilities or reach. If your system is a GPAI model with systemic risk, additional obligations under Article 55 apply on top of the standard GPAI obligations under Article 53. If you are not a GPAI provider, select 'None of the above'.

options.label: Yes — this is a GPAI model with high training compute (>10²⁵ FLOPs) or has been designated systemic-risk by the Commission
None of the above — the system is not a GPAI model with systemic risk, or is not a GPAI model at all
